channel.title: Xiaomi 15 MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 15 MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.5.0.WOCINXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15 India
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 India

Codename: dada

Version: OS3.0.5.0.WOCINXM | 16.0

Size: 8.8 GB

MD5: 62de472568b20d11ce8640e2261a7a28

Changelog:
[System]
Fix: Improved system stability to prevent occasional app crashes
Updated the security patch to March 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.5.0.WOCINXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15 India
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 India

Codename: dada

Version: OS3.0.5.0.WOCINXM | 16.0

Size: 8.1 GB

MD5: 59ea74b8d34e24931a3ce3d53e0e1492

Changelog:
[System]
Fix: Improved system stability to prevent occasional app crashes
Updated the security patch to March 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here

Incremental Update: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOCEUXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15 EEA
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 EEA

Codename: dada

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOCEUXM | 16.0

Size: 9.9 GB

MD5: 21318f383bf269558752f496f29fc574

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.302.0.WOCCNXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15 China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 China

Codename: dada

Version: OS3.0.302.0.WOCCNXM | 16.0

Size: 12.0 GB

MD5: 03b5f57e46e49d85379370bd873e11af

Changelog:
[System]
Fix: Zenless Zone Zero couldn't be controlled or crashed in some cases
Fix: Audiobook apps consumed a lot of power during Always-on display standby in some cases
Fix: Background service issues made devices reboot unexpectedly in some cases
Fix: Gallery photos couldn't be shared as PDF via Touch to share
Fix: Volume buttons sometimes used haptic feedback even when it was turned off
Updated the security patch to April 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOCMIXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15 Global
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Global

Codename: dada

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOCMIXM | 16.0

Size: 11.0 GB

MD5: e54ad8c03161ec6d3970ee663aa1a8c9

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOCIDXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15 Indonesia
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Indonesia

Codename: dada

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOCIDXM | 16.0

Size: 10.1 GB

MD5: 6d9c11f652e97719741e6a5288c621f1

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOCEUXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15 EEA
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 EEA

Codename: dada

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOCEUXM | 16.0

Size: 8.4 GB

MD5: 5d0476048968a49ccdfc48193fe4cb26

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.description:

Codename: dada

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOCRUXM | 16.0

MD5: 67508608b9e2b00d642d9e1cb8624d25

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings

Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days

Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time

Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos

New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOCMIXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15 Global
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Global

Codename: dada

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOCMIXM | 16.0

Size: 8.3 GB

MD5: 40765ad0974a4b153d3df6aa5b80fed3

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time

Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos

New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOCRUXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15 Russia
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Russia

Codename: dada

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOCRUXM | 16.0

Size: 8.2 GB

MD5: 02b288b2b825f377ceaab5b16f51a704

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOCIDXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15 Indonesia
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Indonesia

Codename: dada

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOCIDXM | 16.0

Size: 8.3 GB

MD5: 305db674aba75557763f64965fda021d

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings

Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days

Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions

[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes

New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

[Highlights]
Optimization: Frame drops and stuttering issues in Honor of Kings
[System]
Optimization: System stability
Fix: Errors occurred in some cases

Download: Here
